name: Speak with Animals
description: You forge a temporary bond with nearby beasts, gaining tactical advantage. For the duration, you have advantage on Perception checks, beasts won't attack you unless provoked, and you can use an action to command a beast within 30 feet to make one attack against a target of your choice.
effect: You gain advantage on Perception checks, beasts within range treat you as non-threatening, and once per round you may use an action to command a willing beast to attack. Lasts 10 minutes.
notes: Can be cast as a ritual (add 10 minutes to casting time) — saves the mana cost.
The homebrew version adds tactical beast-command. Engine support for commanding allied NPCs/beasts is a mechanic gap — see spell-mechanics-proposals.md.
Beasts commanded to attack require an available beast NPC within range.
